title: Create: Sound of Steam: Tuning Wrench
description: Adds a wrench for automatically setting the channels of redstone links for Sound of Steam Pipe Organs. Works with survival mode.
body:
# Create: Sound of Steam: Tuning Wrench

> **A survival friendly addon for sound of steam that lets you set redstone link channels automatically**
> 
> **TL;DR: Right-click a pipe with the wrench, and a correctly tuned redstone link is placed underneath.**

# Usage


* Hold Alt+scroll to change the mode
  * Traditional: Sets the links as if every stop is 8'. This is how real pipe organs are configured and is best for use with the keyboard relay
  * Pitch match: matches the frequency to the actual pitch of the pipe (except mutations). Is best for use with the tracker bar and midi playing.
  * the sub-modes define where the links will be placed
* Right-click any Sound of Steam pipe with the wrench.
* A Create redstone link is will be placed two blocks below the pipe, set to recieve and with the correct frequency.
* If you are in survival mode, it will only work if you have redstone links in your invetory, and if so, will remove one when used.

Note: if there is a block or existing redstone link where it is trying to place, the link will not be placed


# Future Plans

* Setting an entire stop at once
* Replacing existing links
* Cog animation
* Better GUI
* Mutations
* Wall Pipes
* Ponder if necessary

# Known Issues

* Does not work with base Create steam whistles (1.21)
* Unknown issues™


# Credits
- Full credit goes to ABathInThyme for writing the original script!
- Deanosaur75 for adding compatibility with Create: Extended Steam Whistles and forge help
- TheAnonym3000 for porting to 1.21
